text:
Does Urinary Incontinence Occur This field indicates when urinary incontinence occurs. 00 = Timed-voiding defers incontinence
01 = Occasional stress incontinence
02 = During the night only
03 = During the day only
04 = During the day and night CHAR 2 x x x x
M1620_BWL_INCONT M1620 (M0540) Bowel Incontinence Frequency This field indicates the frequency of bowel incontinence. 00 = Very rarely or never has bowel incontinence
01 = Less than once weekly
02 = One to three times weekly
03 = Four to
